response.justification: Bogdan has extensive fullstack experience with TypeScript, React, Node.js, and relational databases, aligning well with the role's requirements. His background in scalable architectures, cloud services (AWS), and Kubernetes—though not primary—demonstrates adaptability. However, his recent focus on AI-agent infrastructure may slightly overshadow traditional fullstack development, and his PostgreSQL experience is not explicitly highlighted.
strengths: Strong TypeScript and fullstack development experience across multiple companies and projects
Proven scalability and architecture skills (e.g., GISCollective, Optilyz projects)
Familiarity with AWS services, Docker, and Kubernetes (nice-to-have qualifications)
concerns: Limited explicit PostgreSQL experience (mentions SQL broadly but not PostgreSQL specifically)
Recent work heavily focused on AI-agent infrastructure, which may not align with core fullstack responsibilities
High seniority (Staff/ Senior roles) may indicate overqualification for an entry-level position

key_factors.factor: Recent AI/ML focus vs. core stack alignment
